Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests. Also, "V.I.P." interviews Lucy Brains and "Carol & Sis" finds Chris' interview complicated.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Tim Conway star in "As The Stomach Turns" spoofing "The Exorcist" in the process.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Jim Nabors appears as Carol's season opening guest! Jim plays a neighbor visiting a single woman.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Carol struggles with "Easy Open" packaging, Harvey & Tim spoof Jacques Cousteau, and Carol & Vicki are torn.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Chita Rivera and Vince Edwards help spoof "distinguished women's movies" in "To Each Her Own Tears."
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Vince Edwards

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Rock Hudson spoof "The Murderer Always Rings Twice", and meet a decorator in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Rock Hudson

Video.summary: This "Family Show" features Dick as an airport traveller getting a long, awkward farewell from his family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Don Adams plays a talk show host beset with technical difficulties and Carol's agitated husband.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lesley Ann Warren, Don Adams

Video.summary: Guest star Soupy Sales plays a hospital patient, and joins Carol for the movie spoof "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Soupy Sales, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Steve Lawrence guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray stars as Carol's rival. Also, a "V.I.P." interview and a satiric look at foreign airlines.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Barbara McNair and Carol spoof a classic TV series with "I Try".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Casesar

Video.summary: The season finale features Carol putting the cast on the spot for Q&A, as well as beloved recurring sketches.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays an airport guard. Carol & Harvey play actors suffering Carol's lack of contact lenses.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Spoofs of classic movies abound, including "Ninotchka", "Blackboard Jungle", "Gone With The Wind", and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Nanette Fabray and Trini Lopez!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Trini Lopez, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry & Carl Reiner fly the funny skies in "Disaster '75!" And, one of Carol's classic sketches.
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Ray Charles is a highlight of this episode, featuring Tim Conway in a sketch where they are billboard hangers.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ray Charles

Video.summary: Join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Tim as they spoof a classic Joan Crawford film in the sketch "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Hal Linden takes a leave from the 12th Precinct to cut it up with Carol & company!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Hal Linden

Video.summary: Eunice gets her big break on "The Gong Show!" Also: An interview with the wife of a kidnap victim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Clowning legend Emmett Kelly, a musical performance from The Jackson 5, and Carol in "A Swiped Life."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Emmett Kelly, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray and Michele Lee guest star, featuring a commercial take-off and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Michele Lee

Video.summary: Bing Crosby and Rowan Martin guest! Bing's sketch is set in Brown Derby, while the "Laugh-In" boys are crooks.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Rowan & Martin

Video.summary: Bob Newhart appears in "Carol & Sis" as Roger's accountant. Also: a hungover Harvey gets a bigger headache.
Video.title: Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Sketches include Carol as an old lady feeding birds, Tim as a wacky pharmacist, and Carol & Vicki on a cruise.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features a take-off of the classic Elizabeth Taylor film "National Velvet".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Paul Lynde guests as a real estate man. Also: The 10th Avenue Family & a performance from Carol's Charwoman.
Video.title: Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Tim Conway returns! Tim plays a lion, then teams with Harvey as a pair of military aircraft spotters.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest star Ken Berry joins Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim for the musical movie spoof "Stolen Serenade."
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Neil Sedaka joins in parodies, Harvey learns not to flirt at the I.R.S. office, & Carol gets guests to leave.
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence guest! A chimp bites Tim in one sketch, while another looks at relationships.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Sid Caesar and Barbara McNair guest. McNair and Carol spoof a series, and "V.I.P." features silent film stars.
Video.title: Barbara McNair, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell stars! Includes Roddy joining "The Family" for a reunion, and a "Brief Encounter."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns. Also, "Carol & Sis" plan a surprise party; and Carol is "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Carol appears in a Late, Late Movie presentation of "A Swiped Life"-- take-off of "A Stolen Life."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jack Cassidy & Tim Conway star! Tim plays an orphan, then joins Jack and Carol for "The Story Of A Star."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: David Frost and Marilyn Horne star. Frost plays a Rolls Royce dealer, while Horne takes the musical spotlight.
Video.title: Marilyn Horne, David Frost
